creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: cy
Date: Fri Apr 20 01:54:03 UTC 2018
New revision: 467809
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/467809

Log:
  Add xpdf.desktop files to both xpdf ports so that it is possible to set
  xpdf to be the default PDF viewer via xdg-mime.

  PR:		227627
  Submitted by:	0mp@

Changes:
  head/graphics/xpdf3/Makefile
  head/graphics/xpdf3/files/xpdf.desktop
  head/graphics/xpdf3/pkg-plist
  head/graphics/xpdf4/Makefile
  head/graphics/xpdf4/files/xpdf.desktop
  head/graphics/xpdf4/pkg-plist
